title: Magic of Color
description: An addon adding integration between Pastel and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
body:
**THIS MOD REQUIRES AZURELIB & ACE'S SPELL UTILS**
(Thank you for your understanding)

Magic of Color is an integration mod between Pastel and Iron's Spell 'n Spellbooks, aiming to bring the two mods together through new content and integrated recipes. Currently this mod adds in:

- Bedrock Wizard armor sets
- Gilded Wizard helmet trio
- Bedrock spellbook - Grimoire of Color volume I
- Inquisitor's Gauntlet staff
- Praetor's Gauntlet staff

This is more content planned as this mod is actively in development.

I also have a Discord server! Join [here](https://discord.gg/SCprzpvhK8) to chat, ask questions, or even suggest a feature!
